top_signals.title: Ukrainian drones hit Russia’s largest oil refinery as Zelenskyy says Siberia now ‘within reach’
top_signals.summary: The attack underscores Kyiv's enhanced long-range drone capabilities and comes on the eve of a crucial NATO summit.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Tech Stocks Fall on Semis Weakness; SpaceX Gets Bullish Calls
top_signals.summary: US technology shares extended declines on Tuesday after earnings from Samsung Electronics Co. failed to satisfy investors, spurring worries over the durability of this year’s red-hot artificial intelligence trade.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: DHL Group raises earnings forecast after pre-tax income jumps 29%
top_signals.summary:
DHL has raised 2026 guidance behind strong logistics demand and second-quarter results.

BTG Consulting cites poaching from ‘major competitors’ for boosted revenues
top_signals.summary: London-listed professional services giant BTG Consulting’s revenue has spiked by 10 per cent for the financial year, partly driven by a push to poach senior talent from top competitors in the City. top_signals.title: Supreme Court allows Texas app law requiring age verification to take effect
top_signals.summary: A student advocacy organization and tech trade group had appealed to the high court to stay the Texas App Store Accountability Act on an emergency basis until the lower court rules.
